race.comment: JENNI YOU THINK (16) should be ready to peak third up. Two runs back have been good, getting home strongly at Bendigo when last seen. The query here is she's off a let-up (56 days) but the stable can certainly keep her fit and she's got upside to go again. Not sure what to do with the resuming TRANGOOJAHRAY (13) who only had one run last time in, starting $2.70 against quality opposition and running fairly. Now off a decently long break, drawn wide, she's got ability but might need this one. NEARING LIBERTY (4) was better second up at Caulfield Heath and looks ready to fire while SWEET JASMINE (6) got home nicely on the Hillside and is in the mix.
